name: Data Quality Checks and SLA Metrics
description: Compute a comprehensive data quality report table in a single INSERT...SELECT

checks.name: dq_report has exactly 1 row
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM dq_report;
checks.description: The quality report should be a single summary row

checks.name: duplicate_count = 1
checks.description: Row 3 duplicates row 1 (same sale_date, customer_id, product_id, amount)

checks.name: late_load_count = 1
checks.description: Row 6 was loaded at 14:00, which is after 08:00
